queries.question: Give me all the competitions sponsored by Nike in both tennis and golf.
queries.sql:
SELECT RacquetsAndTournaments.EventName 
FROM RacquetsAndTournaments 
WHERE (RacquetsAndTournaments.EventType = 'Tennis Tournament' OR RacquetsAndTournaments.EventType = 'Golf Tournament') AND RacquetsAndTournaments.sponsor = 'Nike'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?eventname WHERE {
  ?racquetsandtournaments a :RacquetsAndTournaments .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventName ?eventname .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventType ?eventtype_w .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventType ?eventtype_w2 .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:Sponsor ?sponsor_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?eventtype_w) = "Tennis Tournament" || STR(?eventtype_w2) = "Golf Tournament")) && STR(?sponsor_w) = "Nike"))
}

queries.question: Show me all tennis tournaments and golf tournaments sponsored by Nike.
queries.sql:
SELECT RacquetsAndTournaments.EventName 
FROM RacquetsAndTournaments 
WHERE RacquetsAndTournaments.EventType = 'Tennis Tournament' OR RacquetsAndTournaments.EventType = 'Golf Tournament' AND RacquetsAndTournaments.sponsor = 'Nike'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?eventname WHERE {
  ?racquetsandtournaments a :RacquetsAndTournaments .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventName ?eventname .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventType ?eventtype_w .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:EventType ?eventtype_w2 .
  ?racquetsandtournaments p:Sponsor ?sponsor_w .
  FILTER((STR(?eventtype_w) = "Tennis Tournament" || (STR(?eventtype_w2) = "Golf Tournament" && STR(?sponsor_w) = "Nike")))
}
